summary: Testing iteration 59: Time-series metrics, Syslog Viewer, SNMP Traps features. Backend: 18/20 tests passed (90%). Frontend: All 3 new pages working correctly with all UI elements. Sidebar navigation includes all 3 new menu items under 'Operazioni'.

minor.issue: Returns 500 instead of 401/403 when X-API-Key is missing. Error handling should return proper auth error.
Returns 500 instead of 401/403 when X-API-Key is missing. Error handling should return proper auth error.

action_items: MINOR: Fix error handling in syslog-batch and snmp-trap-batch endpoints to return 401/403 instead of 500 when API key is missing
critical_code_review_comments: metric_history.py: GET /api/devices/by-ip/{ip}/metrics correctly aggregates time-series data with $bucket for different periods (1h/6h/24h/7d/30d)
syslog_trap.py: GET /api/connector/syslog and /api/connector/snmp-traps correctly return paginated events with filters
ingestion.py: POST /api/ingest/syslog and /api/ingest/snmp correctly create alerts AND write to syslog_events/snmp_traps collections
connector.py line 1388-1391: record_metrics() is correctly called inside device-report endpoint after _check_device_thresholds
DeviceMetricsPage.js: useSearchParams correctly reads ?ip= parameter to pre-select device
ClientOverviewPage.js line 1037-1044: device-trend-{ip} button correctly navigates to /device-metrics?ip={ip}
Layout.js: Sidebar 'Operazioni' section correctly includes 'Trend Metriche', 'Syslog Viewer', 'SNMP Traps' menu items
seed_data_creation: Seed data already present: metric_history has 270 points for 10.100.61.99 (cpu/memory/temperature), syslog_events has entries, snmp_traps has entries. Additional test data created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Time-series metrics, Syslog Viewer, SNMP Traps features fully tested and working. Backend endpoints: GET /api/devices/by-ip/{ip}/metrics (aggregated time-series), GET /api/connector/syslog, GET /api/connector/snmp-traps, POST /api/ingest/syslog, POST /api/ingest/snmp, POST /api/connector/syslog-batch, POST /api/connector/snmp-trap-batch. Frontend pages: /device-metrics (with ?ip= URL param support), /syslog, /snmp-traps. Sidebar has 3 new menu items under 'Operazioni'. ClientOverviewPage Dispositivi tab has device-trend-{ip} buttons that navigate to /device-metrics?ip={ip}. Minor issue: batch endpoints return 500 instead of 401 when API key missing.

backend_metrics_endpoint.GET /api/devices/by-ip/{ip}/metrics: PASS - Returns aggregated points with ts/avg/min/max

backend_ingestion_endpoints.client_id_required: PASS - Returns 400 without client_id or API key

backend_batch_endpoints.POST /api/connector/syslog-batch: PASS with API key, FAIL without (returns 500 instead of 401)
backend_batch_endpoints.POST /api/connector/snmp-trap-batch: PASS with API key, FAIL without (returns 500 instead of 401)

backend_record_metrics_integration.device-report_calls_record_metrics: PASS - connector.py line 1388-1391 imports and calls record_metrics()

frontend_device_metrics_page.stat_cards: PASS - Ultimo/Media/Picco cards found and populated with seeded data
frontend_device_metrics_page.recharts_graph: PASS - Chart renders with data (7 points visible)
frontend_device_metrics_page.url_param_ip: PASS - ?ip=10.100.61.99 pre-selects device and loads data

frontend_snmp_traps_page.varbinds_display: PASS - Clicking row shows varbinds JSON in detail panel

frontend_client_overview_device_trend_bu.navigation_works: PASS - /device-metrics?ip={ip} URL loads correctly with pre-selected device
